metadata.name: ww-slider
metadata.description: A carousel/slider component built on the Swiper library. Supports multiple transition effects (slide, fade, coverflow, flip, cards), navigation arrows, pagination bullets, autoplay, loop mode, and mousewheel control. Ideal for image galleries, testimonials, feature showcases, and any content that needs horizontal sliding navigation.
features: Multiple transition effects: slide, fade, coverflow, flip, cards
Configurable number of slides per view
Linear transition option for continuous autoplay
Mousewheel control with sensitivity, axis lock, and invert options
Image loading state tracking per slide
Does not support vertical sliding direction
Does not support thumbnails navigation natively
Does not support lazy loading configuration

properties.name: slidesPerView
properties.description: Number of slides visible at the same time. Minimum 1, maximum is the total number of slides.

properties.name: spaceBetween
properties.description: Space between each slide in pixels. Must be a string with 'px' unit, e.g. '10px'.

properties.name: effect
properties.description: Transition effect used when switching slides.

properties.name: transitionDuration
properties.description: Duration of the slide transition in milliseconds. Must be a string with 'ms' unit, e.g. '300ms'.

properties.name: navigation
properties.description: Show or hide the previous/next navigation arrows.

properties.name: pagination
properties.description: Show or hide the pagination bullets below the slider.

properties.name: loop
properties.description: Enable infinite loop mode so the slider wraps around from the last slide back to the first.

properties.name: automatic
properties.description: Enable autoplay to automatically advance slides.

properties.name: automaticTiming
properties.description: Time interval between automatic slide transitions. Must be a string with 's' unit, e.g. '3s'. Only applies when automatic is true.

properties.name: linearTransition
properties.description: Use a linear timing function for transitions instead of the default easing. Only applies when automatic is true.

properties.name: mousewheel
properties.description: Enable mousewheel/trackpad control to navigate slides by scrolling.

properties.name: mousewheelForceToAxis
properties.description: When enabled, mousewheel navigation only responds to scrolling along the slider axis. Only applies when mousewheel is true.

properties.name: mousewheelInvert
properties.description: Invert the mousewheel scroll direction. Only applies when mousewheel is true.

properties.name: mousewheelSensitivity
properties.description: Sensitivity multiplier for mousewheel navigation. Higher values make scrolling more responsive. Only applies when mousewheel is true.

states.name: Not Current Slide
states.description: Applied to slides that are not the currently active slide. Use this to style inactive slides differently.

states.name: Current Slide
states.description: Applied to the pagination bullet icon of the currently active slide.

states.name: active
states.description: Applied to the pagination bullet icon of the currently active slide (alias for Current Slide).

localContext.description: The total number of slides in the slider.
The current number of slides visible at once.
Whether the left (previous) navigation arrow is currently visible.
Whether the right (next) navigation arrow is currently visible.
The total number of pagination bullets displayed.
Object tracking the loading state of images in each slide, including per-slide details and aggregate statistics.
Whether all images across all slides have finished loading.

actions.label: Slide to
actions.description: Navigate to a specific slide by index.

slots.name: mainLayoutContent
slots.description: The repeatable slot containing the slide elements. Each item in this array represents one slide. Can be bound to a data collection to dynamically generate slides.

slots.name: navigationIcons
slots.description: The two navigation arrow icons (previous and next). Contains exactly two icon elements.

slots.name: bulletsIcons
slots.description: The pagination bullet icon element. A single element used as template for all pagination dots.

variables.name: slideImageStates
variables.description: Object tracking the loading state of images in each slide, with per-slide details and aggregate statistics.

variables.name: allImagesLoaded
variables.description: Boolean indicating whether all images across all slides have finished loading.

specifications: CRITICAL: If the ww-slider is a child (or sub-child) of a ww-div using CSS Grid layout, set 'overflow: hidden' on the DIRECT CHILD of the grid that contains the slider.
The effect property only works properly when slidesPerView is 1 for fade, flip, and cards effects.
spaceBetween must include the 'px' unit suffix (e.g. '16px').
automaticTiming must include the 's' unit suffix (e.g. '3s').
transitionDuration must include the 'ms' unit suffix (e.g. '300ms').
When using loop mode, ensure there are enough slides for the loop to work properly (at least 2x slidesPerView).
The slider uses the Swiper library internally

examples.description: A basic image carousel with 3 slides, navigation arrows, and coverflow effect
An auto-playing testimonial slider showing 2 slides at once
